aids.title: CS Requirements: MPB
aids.content:
M - Mutual Exclusion (only one at a time)
P - Progress (no unnecessary delay)
B - Bounded Waiting (no starvation)

"My Processes Behave!"

aids.title: Peterson's Entry
aids.content:
flag[i] = true; // I want in
turn = j; // But you go first
while (flag[j] && turn == j); // Wait

Key: Politeness prevents deadlock!

aids.title: Test-and-Set Pattern
aids.content:
while (TestAndSet(&lock)); // Entry
// Critical Section
lock = false; // Exit

Atomic = No interleaving!
